queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the absence of a checking account as a determinant of increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Investigation into the relationship between no known savings account status and reduced credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of checking account balances between zero and 200 DM on the likelihood of credit default.
